title: Commitment Program Eligibility Details Object
description: Schema for validating the Commitment Program Eligibility Details column JSON object structure in FOCUS datasets

CommitmentPrograms.description: Array of objects identifying commitment programs for which the usage is eligible.

ProgramType.description: The specific type of commitment program (e.g., discount or capacity reservation) available for this usage.

^x_[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$.description: Custom data generator-defined properties prefixed with x_ in PascalCase format
Custom data generator-defined top-level properties prefixed with x_ in PascalCase format
